generic_rules: Repairs should focus on fixing AGREE syntax errors without altering the underlying AADL architecture.
Prioritize corrections to unresolved identifiers or invalid helper declarations when AGREE reports type errors.
Use only visible AADL features or locally declared helpers in AGREE expressions.
syntax_or_pattern_reminders: AGREE contracts are enclosed in `annex agree { ... };` blocks.
Use `assume`, `guarantee`, `eq`, and `const` keywords for contract elements.
Ensure correct AGREE scalar types: `int`, `real`, and `bool`.
anti_patterns: Avoid introducing new AADL architecture to fix AGREE contract errors.
Do not attempt to use implementation-level details within component type contracts.
irrelevant_topics: type scope range assumption and guarantee
